plans.title: It’s Just Water
plans.short: 4 cans/week of pure water, subscription model.
plans.boxAppearance: Matte black cube entangled in twisting, spiked vines—living obsidian wrapped tight. Thin streams of condensation drip from the corners. On contact, the vines seem to pulse—guarding something pure.
plans.aura: Simplicity under siege. Water as defiance against chaos. For those who see past illusion, who want nothing but what is real.
plans.description: It’s not flavored. It’s not complicated. It’s just water—delivered to you weekly in unrelenting black. A sanctuary for the mind. 4 cans. Nothing more.

plans.title: Signature Flavors
plans.short: 4 cans/week of best-selling flavors, rotating seasonally.
plans.boxAppearance: Sleek, balanced crate—elegantly locked with blackened chains. Gilded engravings of past flavor symbols—some worn away, some crossed out. One chain pulses faintly with light, responding only to your identity.
plans.aura: Timelessness, held under control. Flavors that earned their place, but not without cost. Familiarity with shackles on.
plans.description: Four of our most praised flavor signatures, curated by the crowd—bound in place, protected from change. Their popularity earned them chains. Open only if you trust the familiar.

plans.title: Experimental Flavors
plans.short: 4 cans/week, 3 known, 1 new. Includes feedback form link.
plans.boxAppearance: A heavily distorted cube—edges asymmetrical, inconstant in geometry. Etched with glowing glyphs; one face slightly ajar, leaking black mist. A single vine pierces through, wrapped around a severed, blinking eye.
plans.aura: Curiosity turned to ritual. Each week, something comes through. Fear disguised as flavor—and you paid for it.
plans.description: Every week: three flavors from the vaults of the unknown—and one that’s never been seen before. You’re not just tasting. You’re volunteering.
